overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a continuous walk through Night City at night during a light rain. The camera follows a character in a yellow jacket with a red umbrella through urban streets, covered walkways beneath an elevated highway, a vast open plaza with massive digital billboards, and back to busy sidewalks lined with neon-lit storefronts.

events.description: approaching the entrance to the covered area beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: following a character in a yellow jacket holding a red umbrella along the rain-slicked sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past on the wet street with headlights on
guide character in yellow jacket with red umbrella walking ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with yellow structural trim spanning the street ahead
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting street lights with active traffic
dark modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows towering above the street
tall lighting poles casting bright beams through the rainy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy Night City street at night, following a character in a yellow jacket toward an elevated highway underpass. Wet pavement reflects the glow of street lamps and building lights while cars drive past on the left, and the camera moves steadily forward through the moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with shops beneath highway overpass

events.description: enters the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, shielded from direct rainfall
passing by seated individuals and various shop fronts along the curved concrete wall

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the yellow-jacketed character through the covered arcade area with neon-lit shops

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench near the storefronts
pedestrian with dark umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: smooth curved concrete wall covered in graffiti and street art tags
illuminated storefront signage including a green neon pawn shop sign
large vertical digital displays showing animated product advertisements
underside of the highway overpass with exposed steel beams and fluorescent lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving into the sheltered space beneath the highway overpass, the environment shifts to an enclosed walkway with a curved concrete wall on the left and neon-lit shops on the right. The rain is no longer falling directly here, and the lighting becomes predominantly artificial from fluorescent ceiling fixtures and glowing storefront signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with massive digital advertising displays

events.description: exits the covered walkway into a vast open plaza with towering digital billboards and reflective wet pavement
turns left to follow the sidewalk along the street, leaving the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: traversing the open plaza following the guide character, surrounded by scattered pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas

notable_agents.action: character in yellow jacket continuing to lead across the reflective plaza surface
yellow taxi driving along the street adjacent to the plaza

entered.detail: giant vertical digital screens displaying advertisements including 'BE A MAN'S SMELL' in bright colors
wide open paved area with highly reflective wet surface mirroring the billboard lights
dark modern skyscrapers with extensive illuminated window grids

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast urban plaza dominated by massive glowing digital billboards that reflect off the wet pavement. The camera follows the yellow-jacketed character across this open space before turning left to parallel the street, with the highway structure now visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city sidewalk with continuous pedestrian and vehicle traffic

events.description: returns to the covered sidewalk alongside the main street with active neon signage and traffic

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk passing numerous pedestrians with illuminated and glowing umbrellas while cars drive past on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella walking toward the camera
black SUV with headlights on driving along the wet street

entered.detail: dark building facades with street-level windows and illuminated signage
steady flow of vehicles with bright headlights moving along the multi-lane road
regular street lighting poles lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk along the busy street, with neon-lit buildings on the left and constant traffic on the right. The massive digital billboards remain visible but now appear on the right side of the frame as the camera moves parallel to them, while pedestrians with various umbrellas pass by in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban corridor that transitions from a narrow street into a sheltered underpass and finally opens into a vast, neon-lit plaza. It begins on a wet Night City street, following a character in a yellow jacket as the camera glides past reflecting pavement and passing cars toward an elevated highway. As the camera moves beneath the overpass, the environment shifts into a sheltered walkway where the rain ceases and the lighting transforms into a mix of fluorescent ceiling fixtures and glowing storefront signs. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the cover into a massive open plaza dominated by towering digital billboards that cast vibrant reflections across the damp ground. Finally, the camera turns to follow a busy sidewalk, moving parallel to the glowing billboards and constant traffic while pedestrians with umbrellas pass by in the rainy night.
